column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Kola peninsula vegetation plots, Tundra meadows
Dataset Author: Natalia Koroleva and Ekaterina Kopeina (historical data from R. Kalliola incl.)

Dataset Reference: Koroleva, N. E., Kopeina, E. I., Novakovskiy, A. B., & Danilova, A. D. (2019). The syntaxonomy of the grasslands and meadows in mountain tundra of Murmansk Region. Rastitelnost Rossii, 37, 79–105. https://doi.org/10.31111/vegrus/2019.37.79
Dataset Table:  Species Cover Data for Kola peninsula, tundra meadows

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale. Taxa are listed in alphabetical order. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
